name: B2B Logistics Visibility SaaS for Informal Carriers
problem_statement: Small trucking operators (1-10 trucks) have no visibility into their fleet or cargo. They coordinate via WhatsApp voice notes. No software exists at their price point ($0-30/mo).
target_customer: Owner-operator trucking companies with 1-10 vehicles in LATAM
trigger_signal: Reddit thread: 300+ upvotes on 'how do small carriers track loads without TMS?'
evidence_summary: Multiple Reddit/Twitter threads, Fleetio reviews, fragmented WhatsApp coordination visible in Facebook groups
kill_reason: Sample placeholder record — unscored, no evidence base. Re-ingest with real signals if opportunity resurfaces.
